channel.title: Projects on Richard Lehane
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Richard Lehane

item.title: Archive Management System review
item.description: Current state review of archive management and digital preservation systems for a regional heritage centre, with Recordkeeping Innovation (RKI).

item.title: Checklist for assessing business systems
item.description: Development of a checklist for assessing business systems for a government recordkeeping regulator, with Recordkeeping Innovation (RKI).

item.title: Authority Editor
item.description: In 2025, I re-built Authority Editor for State Records NSW. This is an editing tool to create, manage, and transform retention and diposal authorities in XML. Authority Editor reimplements an original version of the tool (that I also wrote), that has been in use at State Records for the last sixteen years. The new version of Authority Editor is distributed as both a native Windows application and an online tool. Both are free to install and use.

item.title: Enterprise Information Architecture
item.description: I worked with Recordkeeping Innovation (RKI) on a six-month project to develop an Enterprise Information Architecture for a Commonwealth agency. This has involved a current state assessment, assessing their systems and practices for information management, and designing a future state information architecture that addresses their pain points and uplifts their information governance capacity.

item.title: Siplicity - A digital preservation triage tool
item.description: I’m working on a new tool called Siplicity. It is a tool for profiling, analysing, selecting, structuring, describing, and packaging digital files for ingest into a digital repository.

item.title: Data retention
item.description: I worked on two projects for clients of elevenM relating to the implementation of disposal for datasets within datalakes like Snowflake and Databricks. Unmanaged retention of data can cause privacy and compliance risks. For these projects I developed principles, metadata requirements, and playbooks for disposal.

item.title: Digital asset survey
item.description: Digital asset survey for a NSW government agency. Analysed the outputs of a series of outsourced, audio-visual digitisation projects to make recommendations for the control and digital preservation of the assets. The main challenge was to integrate a diverse set of metadata (file system metadata, manifests provided to/ received from the digitisation supplier, catalogue exports) to build an consolidated, inter-linked, and authoritative view of the digitial assets.

item.title: WASM build of Siegfried
item.description: Archives NZ sponsored the development of a WASM build for Siegfried, the file format identification tool that I created. This means that Siegfried can be run in a web browser, client-side, and without the need for end-users to install the tool. For more details, see this LinkedIn post.

item.title: Artificial Intelligence Governance Toolkit
item.description: In collaboration with Recordkeeping Innovation (RKI), I developed an Artificial Intelligence Governance Toolkit. This comprises an AI Governance Maturity Model, risk rating tool, AI systems register, information managers’ checklist and a model corporate AI policy. More information about RKI’s AI governance services is available here.
